overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a lush traditional Japanese temple garden in spring. The character passes moss-covered wooden structures, stone lanterns, and cherry blossom trees before reaching a tranquil pond with a waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden path with moss-covered wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone-lined dirt path beside a mossy temple building

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on a wooden bench beside the path

entered.detail: traditional wooden temple structure covered in green moss with curved roof
traditional Japanese stone lantern beside the pathway
wooden bench with a seated villager in traditional clothing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path lined with stones, passing a traditional moss-covered temple building on the left. A stone lantern stands on the right side of the path as the character approaches a villager sitting on a wooden bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden area with ancient trees and stone stairway

events.description: passes the seated villager and transitions from the temple path to the open garden area

agents.ego_description: walking past the villager and continuing along the path into a more open garden space

entered.detail: massive ancient tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
stone staircase leading up a small hill
large moss-covered boulders and rock outcrops

segments.scene_description: After passing the villager, the character enters a more open garden area with a large ancient tree on the right. Stone stairs are visible ahead leading up a small hill, while the temple building recedes into the background on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with white flowering trees and wildflowers

events.description: black smoke becomes visible in the distant sky above the mountains

agents.ego_description: walking through the meadow, passing under a twisted ancient tree and heading toward the rocky area

entered.detail: gnarled ancient tree with twisted trunk and white blossoms
dark black smoke rising from behind the distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a beautiful meadow filled with white wildflowers and cherry blossom trees. A distinctive twisted tree stands beside the path, while in the distance, black smoke begins to rise above the mountains, indicating a fire or battle.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterside garden with pond and waterfall

events.description: approaching the water's edge with a small waterfall and stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the path toward the pond, approaching a villager working near the water's edge

notable_agents.action: villager in blue clothing crouching by the water's edge, appearing to wash or gather something

entered.detail: tranquil pond with a small cascading waterfall and clear blue water
small stone bridge crossing over a narrow part of the stream
another moss-covered wooden building visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a serene pond with a small waterfall and a stone bridge. A villager in blue clothing is crouched near the water's edge. The distant smoke remains visible in the sky as the character walks along the water's edge, with another mossy temple building visible across the pond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene temple garden that gradually transitions from enclosed architectural paths to an open, blossom-filled landscape marked by distant unrest. It begins along a winding dirt path, passing a moss-covered temple building and a stone lantern before gliding past a villager resting on a wooden bench. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wider garden area where the temple recedes and a large ancient tree appears beside stone stairs leading up a small hill. The path then shifts into a vibrant meadow of white wildflowers and cherry blossom trees, passing a distinctive twisted tree while black smoke begins to rise over the distant mountains. Finally, the camera reaches a tranquil pond with a small waterfall and stone bridge, moving past a crouched villager in blue clothing toward another mossy temple building across the water.
